name: Lifecycle Hooks Configuration
description: Lifecycle hooks configuration page (/configure/hooks). In CI with no runner on port 9876, useRunnerHealth returns isOffline=true and the page renders its offline state: the 'Lifecycle Hooks' heading (shared across all states) plus RunnerOfflineState showing 'Runner Not Connected'. The heading is the universal structural anchor; the RunnerOfflineState heading is the CI-specific proof that the offline branch rendered cleanly (not stuck loading). Ports configure.spec.ts hooks section. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Page heading
states.description: The 'Lifecycle Hooks' heading renders in both offline and online states. Its presence proves the page mounted.

assertions.description: 'Lifecycle Hooks' heading — universal across offline/online states.

states.name: Runner offline state
states.description: RunnerOfflineState component rendered when useRunnerHealth reports isOffline=true (no runner on port 9876 in CI). The h3 'Runner Not Connected' heading is the stable marker.
